C3.note: Full chain min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/prod present and finished. prod.mdout reached NSTEP=25,000,000 (50 ns, TIME 51200 ps). AVERAGES: TEMP 299.98 ± 3.42 K, Density 1.0241 g/cc, Etot stable (-26730 ± 96). No blow-up/NaN; density physical, energy stationary.

C4.note: Analysis directly targets the prompt's secondary-structure-stability question: cpptraj DSSP per-frame + per-residue (dssp_total.dat, dssp_sum.dat), backbone RMSD to crystal (rmsd_backbone.dat), per-residue RMSF, Rg (radgyr.dat), H-bonds. Correct methods and observables for 'does it stay folded / analyze secondary structure stability.'

C5.note: Paper (Lindorff-Larsen et al. Science 2011, PMID 22034434) confirms villin/HP35 spontaneously folds to and is stable in its native three-helix bundle. Answer key expects: stays folded, RMSD < 3 Å, stable α-helices. Agent: backbone RMSD 0.90 ± 0.23 Å (max 2.0, verified rmsd_backbone.dat range 0.40-2.00), α-helix 65.7% with no β content, Rg 9.47 ± 0.13 Å (compact), three native helices retained. Fully matches paper-confirmed expectation.
